youtube.title: 10M Token Context in Agentic AI: How? #Shorts
youtube.description: Designing a robust system for 10M token context in 50-turn agentic conversations involves a multi-layered approach. The Vertex AI Agent Engine orchestrates the conversation flow, leveraging Gemini 2.5 Pro or Gemini 3.1 Pro for core reasoning and generation within their respective context windows. To manage the vast context, summarization loops continuously condense past turns, preserving key information. Memory compression techniques further optimize token usage, while Retrieval Augmentation, powered by a Vector Database, fetches relevant external knowledge to enrich responses without exceeding active context limits. This ensures scalable and coherent long-form agentic interactions. Subscribe for daily Cloud Architect breakdowns.

thumbnail.headline: 10M TOKEN CONTEXT?
thumbnail.subheadline: Agentic AI conversation with massive context window explained.
